checks.name: Step gating parity
checks.assertion: Step transitions and gate failures match baseline for all three steps

checks.name: Hash routing parity
checks.assertion: Direct and in-app navigation for #step-1/#step-2/#step-3 produce same allowed/blocked outcomes as baseline

checks.name: PAT clearing boundary
checks.assertion: PAT is sent only for secure intake and cleared immediately after connect

checks.name: Tool contract parity
checks.assertion: Tool names, argument shapes, and server interaction sequence remain unchanged

checks.name: URI compatibility
checks.assertion: Entry and step resource URIs remain unchanged and resolvable

checks.name: Metadata compatibility
checks.assertion: openai/outputTemplate and widget metadata wiring remain unchanged

checks.name: Fallback behavior
checks.assertion: Text fallback remains available when UI bundle is unavailable
